scenarios.name: Happy Path
scenarios.description: Simplest success flow: 1 worker, 1 validator, approved on first try

scenarios.name: Validator First
scenarios.description: Validator claims before any worker submits

scenarios.name: Competitive Workers
scenarios.description: Multiple workers submit, one wins

scenarios.name: Rejection Loop
scenarios.description: Worker rejected, resubmits, eventually approved

scenarios.name: Total Rejection
scenarios.description: All submissions rejected, job stays open

scenarios.name: Validator Waitlist
scenarios.description: Two validators claim, first serves, second on waitlist

scenarios.name: Validator Rotation
scenarios.description: First validator times out, second from waitlist takes over

scenarios.name: Worker No-Show
scenarios.description: No one submits work

scenarios.name: Validator No-Show
scenarios.description: Validator claims but never reviews

scenarios.name: Job Cancelled
scenarios.description: Employer cancels after worker submits

scenarios.name: Deadline Expiry
scenarios.description: Timed job, deadline passes

scenarios.name: Rating Gate Pass
scenarios.description: Worker meets rating threshold

scenarios.name: Rating Gate Fail
scenarios.description: Worker below rating threshold

scenarios.name: Rating Gate New User
scenarios.description: Worker with 0 reviews on rating-gated job

scenarios.name: Approved + Not Approved
scenarios.description: One approved worker, one non-approved try to submit

scenarios.name: Multiple Submissions Same Worker
scenarios.description: Same worker submits multiple times (if allowed)

scenarios.name: Hard Validation Auto
scenarios.description: HARD_ONLY script runs automatically

scenarios.name: Hard Then Soft
scenarios.description: Script runs, then validator reviews

scenarios.name: Hard Script Retry
scenarios.description: Script fails first submission, worker resubmits, script passes second attempt

scenarios.name: Hard Script Fail
scenarios.description: Script rejects submission, no successful resubmission — job stays pending or expires
